mnemonics: DIGITAL Design Procedure: Define Inputs, Generate Truth Table, Implement Logic, Analyze Logic, Test And Verify
keyPoints: Always start by defining the problem and required inputs/outputs
The truth table is the foundation for all subsequent design steps
Boolean algebra simplification is crucial for efficient circuit implementation
commonMistakes: Skipping the truth table step and trying to implement logic directly
Forgetting to consider 'don't care' conditions in the truth table
Not verifying the final circuit against the original specification
